summary: Iteration 3 testing complete for Turonlimo Quote endpoint + design changes (Premium SUV removed, Luxury Sedan added, fleet image swaps). All 27 backend pytest cases pass (22 from prev iters + 5 new TestQuote class). Frontend Fleet shows exactly 5 cards with correct models/images. Live debounced quote panel renders 6 cards on SFO->Pier 39, with $ prices for Executive/Luxury Sedan/Luxury SUV and 'Call for quote' for Stretch/Sprinter/Party Bus. Clicking quote card auto-selects vehicle dropdown (verified Executive Sedan, then Luxury Sedan). End-to-end booking with vehicle_type='Luxury Sedan' submitted successfully and success toast shown.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _geocode: Nominatim usage policy requires <=1 req/sec. Current implementation issues two sequential geocodes (pickup+dropoff) per /api/quote call without an explicit 1s sleep — relies on cache for speed but a cold first hit fires 2 requests in ~tens of ms. Recommend adding asyncio.sleep(1.1) between candidate calls or a global semaphore to stay strictly compliant.
server.py /api/quote: no rate limiting on the endpoint itself. A bot could trivially flood Nominatim through the proxy. Add per-IP throttling or short-TTL request memoization to protect the upstream.
server.py: VEHICLE_PRICING is hardcoded in source. Any rate change requires a deploy. Consider moving to DB or a config file for ops flexibility.

server.py _geocode: silently retries with ', California, USA' suffix even when user provides a non-California address — could return wrong coordinates for, say, 'Austin' (Texas). For now Bay-Area-only is fine but log/flag this for future multi-region rollout.

BookingForm.jsx: quote panel re-fires the POST on every keystroke after debounce — including when only one field changes after both are valid. Could batch by also debouncing on focus-blur or only fetching when the trimmed string actually changed since last fetch.

BookingForm.jsx line 99: useEffect cleanup `return () => quoteTimer.current && clearTimeout(quoteTimer.current);` is fine but the duplicated clearTimeout earlier in the effect is slightly redundant — minor.
Carry-over: CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True; pickup_date/pickup_time still raw strings without format validation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (fleet, quote panel, auto-select, end-to-end submission all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created end-to-end booking 'TEST UI Iter3' via UI with vehicle_type='Luxury Sedan'. Pytest TEST_-prefixed bookings are cleaned up automatically via DELETE in their fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_turonlimo_api.py -v. TestQuote class covers /api/options Luxury Sedan ordering, /api/quote success+pricing math+fallback, and booking with Luxury Sedan. Pricing formulas validated: Executive Sedan = max(75 + 3.50*miles, 85), Luxury Sedan = max(95 + 4.50*miles, 115), Luxury SUV = max(115 + 4.75*miles, 135). Frontend quote panel debounce is 1100ms — wait >=2s after typing both pickup+dropoff. Quote card selectors are [data-testid='quote-card-{vehicle_type}'] (with spaces in vehicle name). Geocode results are persistently cached in db.geocode_cache, so SFO/Pier 39/Palo Alto resolutions are fast on subsequent runs.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All Iteration 3 acceptance criteria met: (1) Premium SUV/Lincoln Navigator absent, (2) Luxury Sedan + Mercedes S-Class card present, (3) Cadillac XTS, Cadillac Escalade, Hummer Stretch, Mercedes Jet Sprinter labels correct with images loading, (4) /api/quote returns 6 quotes with correct pricing math and fallback semantics, (5) /api/options has Luxury Sedan in correct position, (6) booking with Luxury Sedan persists, (7) quote panel renders+auto-selects vehicle, (8) end-to-end submission shows success toast.
